seoTitle: How to Set Up a Simple CRM in ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to turn ClickUp into a working CRM with deal stages, custom fields, intake forms, and a sales pipeline dashboard.
intro: ClickUp isn't purpose-built as a CRM, but its flexible custom fields, statuses, and forms can be configured to work like one for teams that don't need a dedicated sales platform. This guide covers mapping your sales funnel onto ClickUp's Spaces and Lists, adding fields for deal value and contact details, and building an intake form so inbound leads land directly in your pipeline.

steps.heading: Map your sales funnel
steps.body: Create a dedicated Sales Space and build out Lists that represent your pipeline stages.

steps.heading: Add custom fields for deal details
steps.body: Set up fields for deal value, contact phone numbers, and company names so every lead record carries the details your team needs.

steps.heading: Customize your status colors
steps.body: Configure custom task statuses to mirror your sales cycle, from New Lead through Closed-Won.

steps.heading: Build a public intake form
steps.body: Use a ClickUp Form view to capture inbound web inquiries and automatically create pipeline tasks from them.

steps.heading: Switch to Board view for deal stages
steps.body: Group your account profiles visually by their current sales stage using the Kanban board view.

steps.heading: Automate follow-ups and track revenue
steps.body: Set up automation for follow-up task schedules, and add a dashboard with widgets to track total pipeline valuation and closing ratios.

faq.question: Is ClickUp actually a CRM?
faq.answer: Not out of the box, but its custom fields, statuses, and automation rules can be configured to function like a simple CRM for teams that don't need dedicated sales software.

faq.question: Can I track total pipeline value automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, calculation footers at the bottom of your table can show cumulative pipeline valuation based on your deal value custom field.

faq.question: Can leads submit their own information directly into my pipeline?
faq.answer: Yes, a ClickUp Form view can capture public inbound inquiries and automatically add them as tasks to your sales pipeline.

faq.question: Can I summarize a client's interaction history automatically?
faq.answer: ClickUp Brain can be used to extract a concise summary of recent client interaction history from a task's activity.
